revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-4-280

In telephony, a device primarily intended to permit the through transmission of audio frequency currents whilst preventing the through transmission of d.c. signals.


Note: The bridge may have other functions such as the control of the holding, supervision and release of a connection. It may also feed microphone current to the telephone instrument.

Reference: I.E.C.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Transmission bridge}}
